title: stelis flexa
intro: Stelis flexa, also known as the flexible stelis or orchid, is a species of orchid found in tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Stelis flexa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and act as an expectorant to aid in the relief of coughs and colds. Stelis flexa can be prepared as a herbal infusion or decoction, and in some cultures, it is also used as a topical treatment for skin conditions and wounds.
